SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-18-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $613.50 FILED BY FINANCIAL DISTRICT PHYSICAL THERAPY JOHNSON, GREGORY S., P.T. SCHMETZ, KARL S., P.T. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOUIS V. KELLER CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
UNTIMELY POS, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO COURT DATE ON SUB-SERVE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIS V. KELLER CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FINANCIAL DISTRICT PHYSICAL THERAPY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FINANCIAL DISTRICT PHYSICAL THERAPY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LOUIS V. KELLER CORP. $613.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $668.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
